calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Jun-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Faye Lee Bresler appeared via zoom (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 29, 2023 is admitted to probate. Faye Lee Bresler is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 11, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Continued To May-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court noted that it recently received an update that attorney Peter Bresler had recently suffered from health problems. Therefore, the court opted not to issue an Order to Show Cause regarding sanctions for failure to appear. The court continued the matter to May 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and will issue an Order to Appear for an attorney from the firm to appear at the next hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
